title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.010 - Town construed
text:
80.010.  Town construed. — When the word "town" is used in this chapter concerning the incorporation of towns and villages, it shall be construed to include village.  In relation to corporations under this chapter, it shall be construed to mean village only.
(RSMo 1939 § 655, A. 1949 H.B. 2030) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 655; 1919 § 7058; 1909 § 8057
